paper_quote: Every EML term has at least one node, so K ≥ 1.
informal_pl: Dla każdego termu EML zachodzi size t ≥ 1. Dowód indukcyjny: liść ma rozmiar 1, a węzeł 1 + size t + size u ≥ 1.
informal_en: For every EML term, size t ≥ 1. Inductive proof: leaves have size 1; nodes have 1 + size t + size u ≥ 1.
lean_target_signature: theorem EMLTerm.size_pos (t : EMLTerm) : 1 ≤ EMLTerm.size t := by sorry
notes: Cases on t; .one is reflexive 1 ≤ 1; .eml needs Nat.le_add ish.
